creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Benjamin Fang from comment #23)
Hi Benjamin,

Since this patch hasn't been integrated into FreeBSD yet, you need to recompile the acpi_ibm kernel module yourself before you can use these sysctls.

If you aren't able to compile the kernel module yourself, you may contact me privately for a binary.

Regards,
Kevin
